known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: no OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract exists.
The exact-category core now exposes class-level composition-stability fields and the canonical MetrizableLCA instance fills them, but the complete original four-task witness is still absent.

Yoneda one-fold extensions and positive-degree chains now expose their ambient exact-category head inflation/deflation maps and descend relation/split-factor/Baer-sum laws through YonedaExt.ofPositiveChain and into public Yoneda product relation, split-factor, additivity, negation, subtraction, and casted associativity laws for positive-chain representatives and Ext classes; positive-degree casts now preserve zero, addition, negation, subtraction, and public Baer sums; quotient-generator zero/neg/add simp lemmas are available; quotient-wide positive-degree Yoneda product associativity is available both with an explicit target-degree cast and with the canonical omega cast; public Baer-sum group laws now include negative-summand and subtraction transport lemmas; quotient-wide Yoneda product neg/sub laws are available in both variables; public Baer-sum negative-summand product subtraction laws are available for both summand positions and both product variables; strict MetrizableLCA has a direct Yoneda Ext specialization API; and Ext^1 representatives can now be built directly from canonical Quillen conflations or from the challenge's closed-inclusion/open-surjection/algebraically exact data. The full Yoneda Ext group obligation is still not audited as a final positive witness.

Bounded derived infinity-category integration remains incomplete as an original-contract obligation, but the direct bounded weak-equivalence mapping-cone API, its strict MetrizableLCA specialization, the strict MetrizableLCA left-calculus semantic-field package constructor, the W830 direct-data semantic-field package route, the W831 comparison-bijectivity semantic-field package route, and the short product-facing BoundedDerived.Basic facade are now present and audited.
remaining_work: Continue from the existing exact-category/Yoneda API toward a genuine OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface.

Continue from the strengthened exact-category core, strict MetrizableLCA Yoneda Ext specialization API, direct Yoneda Ext constructors from Quillen conflations and closed-inclusion/open-surjection/algebraically exact data, positive-chain representative/class product relation/split/additivity/associativity bridge, positive Yoneda Ext cast additive API, quotient-generator simp API, quotient-wide Yoneda product associativity, public Baer-sum group/subtraction laws, quotient-wide Yoneda product neg/sub laws, and public Baer-sum negative-summand product subtraction laws into the remaining final-witness integration.

Continue the bounded derived infinity-category positive witness integration from the audited direct bounded weak-equivalence mapping-cone API, the strict MetrizableLCA Dbounded weak-equivalence surface, the strict MetrizableLCA left-calculus package constructor, the W830 direct-data semantic-field package route, the W831 comparison-bijectivity semantic-field package route, and the BoundedDerived.Basic facade, while preserving the separation between nonterminal API evidence and a genuine OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface.
